description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a job named cloud-native-image that runs in the post-test stage using the ruby:2.6-alpine Docker image. The job is allowed to fail, has no dependencies, sets the variable GIT_DEPTH='1', runs manually, and only triggers on tag refs when $CI_SERVER_HOST equals "gitlab.com" and $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE equals "gitlab-org". Its script executes the command install_gitlab_gem and then runs CNG_PROJECT_PATH="gitlab-org/build/CNG" BUILD_TRIGGER_TOKEN=$CI_JOB_TOKEN ./scripts/trigger-build cng.
